solarDateResolution.note: A stem-branch year (e.g. Giáp Tuất) repeats every 60 years; without an absolute year the lunar->solar mapping is genuinely ambiguous. Chart-fact snapshots are only built for unambiguous resolutions.

phases.name: Controlled calendar corpus
requirements: same date controls year/month/day while hour changes
capture Mệnh score, total and all palace scores where available

phases.name: Broad discovery corpus
requirements: stratify by Cục, Mệnh branch, major-star configuration, VCD, Tuần/Triệt and Tứ Hóa

phases.name: Expert-reviewed benchmark
requirements: independent expert labels for rule explanations
no source-output access during final evaluation

matchedPairs.note: Matched over parsed birth-title facts only (no resolved chart structure yet available in V0.1).

baselineModels.description: Predicts each palace name's training-set mean for every observation.
caveats: N=18 seed records — far below the quality-gates.v0.1.json unseen-holdout requirement; this is an in-sample demonstration that the tooling works, not a promotion-eligible evaluation.

baselineModels.description: Placeholder for the prompt's Model 1 (palace name + Cục + Mệnh branch + major-star configuration + brightness). Only palace name is available without resolved chart facts, so this is numerically identical to Model 0 in V0.1 — not yet a real second rung on the model ladder.
caveats: N=18 seed records — far below the quality-gates.v0.1.json unseen-holdout requirement; this is an in-sample demonstration that the tooling works, not a promotion-eligible evaluation.
Cannot yet condition on Cục/Mệnh branch/major-star configuration — no seed record has a resolved chart-fact snapshot.
